Monday.dinner: Brined roast chicken with roasted carrots and green beans
Monday.dad_lunch: Leftover pizza slice, orange, cheese stick
Monday.boys_help: JP: Set up brine for chicken (salt water solution) · Joseph: Wash and peel carrots for roasting · Michael: Rinse green beans under tap

Tuesday.dinner: Leftovers: roast chicken, reheated vegetables, mac and cheese from box
Tuesday.dad_lunch: Leftover roast chicken, roasted carrots, orange
Tuesday.boys_help: JP: Reheat chicken and vegetables in oven · Joseph: Prepare mac and cheese from box · Michael: Set out plates and napkins

Wednesday.lunch: Chicken and vegetable soup (batch soup for week), crackers
Wednesday.dinner: Ground beef chili with northern beans, cornbread, simple salad
Wednesday.dad_lunch: Thermos of chicken vegetable soup, crackers, orange
Wednesday.boys_help: JP: Brown ground beef for chili on stove · Joseph: Open and drain canned beans · Michael: Tear lettuce for salad

Thursday.dinner: Roast beef with mashed potatoes (from box) and steamed mixed vegetables
Thursday.dad_lunch: Leftover chili in thermos, crackers, fruit cup
Thursday.boys_help: JP: Season and sear roast beef before oven · Joseph: Prepare mashed potatoes from box · Michael: Rinse frozen mixed vegetables

Friday.lunch: Sardine sandwiches with pickles, or soup
Friday.dinner: Fish fry (flounder fillets), french fries, coleslaw
Friday.boys_help: JP: Set up fish fry station and heat oil · Joseph: Mix coleslaw dressing and vegetables · Michael: Arrange pickles in serving dish

Saturday.dinner: Curry chicken (using Japanese curry mix) over rice with edamame
Saturday.boys_help: JP: Cut chicken into curry-sized pieces with chef's knife · Joseph: Measure rice and curry ingredients · Michael: Rinse edamame pods

Sunday.dinner: Ziplock Buffet (leftovers): remaining chili, curry, soup, various sides
Sunday.boys_help: JP: Reheat multiple leftover containers in oven · Joseph: Label and organize leftover containers · Michael: Set out serving spoons for buffet

grocery_gaps: Pancake mix or flour for pancakes

prep_notes.Monday: Morning: Start chicken brine. Afternoon: Remove chicken from brine, pat dry before roasting
prep_notes.Tuesday: Morning: No prep needed - leftover day
prep_notes.Wednesday: Morning: Defrost ground beef. Midday: Chop vegetables for chili
prep_notes.Thursday: Morning: Defrost roast beef. Afternoon: Bring to room temperature before cooking
prep_notes.Friday: Morning: Defrost flounder fillets. Afternoon: Set up fish fry station
prep_notes.Saturday: Morning: Defrost chicken for curry. Afternoon: Prep curry vegetables
prep_notes.Sunday: Morning: Assess all leftovers and plan combinations for buffet

use_soon_used: Sprouted red onion: used in Wednesday chili
